info.name: BDS Platform API Docs (Auto)

variable.description: Base URL của API server (bao gồm /api/v1)

exec: // Handle both access_token and data.token formats
console.log("✅ Token saved to collection variables");

item.name: Admin list all properties (không bị area scoping)

request.description:
Create user

### Code Examples
```dart
// Flutter (Dio)
var response = await dio.request('{{baseUrl}}/admin/users',
  options: Options(method: 'POST'),
  data: {
    "name": "Test Name",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "role": "",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "dob": "",
    "permanent_address": "",
    "current_address": "",
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "area_ids": 100
}
);
```

```javascript
// React Native (Axios)
const response = await api.post('{{baseUrl}}/admin/users', {
    "name": "Test Name",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "role": "",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "dob": "",
    "permanent_address": "",
    "current_address": "",
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "area_ids": 100
});
console.log(response.data);
```

```swift
// iOS (Alamofire)
AF.request("{{baseUrl}}/admin/users",
           method: .post,
           parameters: [:], // Replace with params
           encoding: JSONEncoding.default,
           headers: headers)
  .responseJSON { response in debugPrint(response) }
```

request.description:
Update user

### Code Examples
```dart
// Flutter (Dio)
var response = await dio.request('{{baseUrl}}/admin/users/{user}',
  options: Options(method: 'PUT'),
  data: {
    "name": "Test Name",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "role": "",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "dob": "",
    "permanent_address": "",
    "current_address": "",
    "is_locked": false,
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "area_ids": 100
}
);
```

```javascript
// React Native (Axios)
const response = await api.put('{{baseUrl}}/admin/users/{user}', {
    "name": "Test Name",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "role": "",
    "phone": "0901234567",
    "dob": "",
    "permanent_address": "",
    "current_address": "",
    "is_locked": false,
    "password_confirmation": "password123",
    "area_ids": 100
});
console.log(response.data);
```

```swift

           method: .put,
           parameters: [:], // Replace with params
           encoding: JSONEncoding.default,
           headers: headers)
  .responseJSON { response in debugPrint(response) }
```

item.name: Gửi email thông báo Property approved
Gửi email thông báo Property rejected
Gửi email thông báo OwnerPhoneRequest approved
Update file order and primary status
List properties (with area scoping for FIELD_STAFF)
Create new property (auto set to PENDING)

request.description:
Create new property (auto set to PENDING)

### Code Examples
```dart
// Flutter (Dio)
var response = await dio.request('{{baseUrl}}/properties',
  options: Options(method: 'POST'),
  data: {
    "category_id": 1,
    "area_id": 100,
    "district_id": "",
    "ward_id": "",
    "project_id": "",
    "title": "Test Title",
    "description": "Test description content",
    "address": "",
    "price": 1000000,
    "area": 100,
    "owner_name": "Test Name",
    "owner_phone": "0901234567",
    "bedrooms": "",
    "bathrooms": "",
    "direction": "",
    "floor": "",
    "lat": "",
    "lng": "",
    "legal_status": "",
    "image_file_ids": "",
    "legal_doc_file_ids": ""
}
);
```

```javascript
// React Native (Axios)
const response = await api.post('{{baseUrl}}/properties', {
    "category_id": 1,
    "area_id": 100,
    "district_id": "",
    "ward_id": "",
    "project_id": "",
    "title": "Test Title",
    "description": "Test description content",
    "address": "",
    "price": 1000000,
    "area": 100,
    "owner_name": "Test Name",
    "owner_phone": "0901234567",
    "bedrooms": "",
    "bathrooms": "",
    "direction": "",
    "floor": "",
    "lat": "",
    "lng": "",
    "legal_status": "",
    "image_file_ids": "",
    "legal_doc_file_ids": ""
});
console.log(response.data);
```

```swift
// iOS (Alamofire)
AF.request("{{baseUrl}}/properties",
           method: .post,
           parameters: [:], // Replace with params
           encoding: JSONEncoding.default,
           headers: headers)
  .responseJSON { response in debugPrint(response) }
```
